title: Chatbot App
description: A request for a Chatbot App.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Chatbot App (DEM-2026-0010)

Executive Summary:
This project proposes developing a Chatbot App (DEM-2026-0010) to enhance our customer digital experience. It will provide instant support and information, streamlining customer interactions effectively.

Direct Business Value/Impact:
The app will reduce support ticket volumes and associated operational costs through automated responses. It will also boost customer satisfaction by offering 24/7 self-service and faster issue resolution.

Potential Risk Mitigation:
Medium risks will be mitigated via a phased implementation and robust data security protocols. Ongoing training, performance monitoring, and user feedback will ensure accuracy and acceptance.
capacity_reasoning: Delivery team has 26% overall available capacity.
Constraint: Senior Architect has only 5 units available (requires 10).
Skill gap: Required skills Backend Development, Frontend Development, AI/ML are missing in the available workforce.
Earliest available start date is deferred by 30 days to 2026-08-06.
